data.title: QXO appoints a chief technology officer
data.description: Val Liborski will oversee QXO’s technology strategy, product development, and data infrastructure as the company pursues its vision to build a digital-first industrial services and distribution platform.

data.title: Albertsons maintains 20%+ digital sales growth in Q4
data.description: Incoming CEO Susan Morris said Albertsons is focusing on using ecommerce, loyalty, pharmacy and the integration of mobile app for use in stores. All four of those channels will help the retailer generate "robust data" for the Albertsons Media Collective.

data.title: Campbell’s appoints a chief digital and technology officer
data.description: The announcement comes as Campbell’s continues efforts to modernize operations and expand digital initiatives across its Meals & Beverages and Snacks divisions.

data.title: Ecommerce businesses face new tariff cost pressure
data.description: Ecommerce platforms and technology vendors face a bifurcated outlook. Some may delay or cancel new contracts, while others will double down on automation and AI to manage rising input costs.

data.title: EBay says its new AI-aided tool cut steps to create listings in half
data.description: The updated flow for listing creation on mobile devices leverage's eBay's AI-powered magical listing tool to suggest details to sellers.
